version.name: 0.48-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.48-beta Changelog: + Continuous Action Optimization : Refined underlying logic and performance details for continuous-type actions. + Track Positioning Enhancements : Improved Track locating functionality; specific features now support "Center" or "Pin to Top" track views. + Hook Shortcut Management : Added a popup notification when the number of mounted Hook shortcuts exceeds 5. + Rename Feature Refactoring : Completely restructured the Rename tool, now offering two distinct modes: Simple and Advanced. + UI Bug Fixes : Resolved an issue regarding double-click behavior on the title bar.
-- Mantrika Team -- 2026-04.07
